queries.question: Show all the credit card balances, on top of that show the balances for personal loans paying 15% interest.
queries.sql:
SELECT Account.Balance 
FROM Account
WHERE Account.ConsumerLending = "Credit Card" OR Account.ConsumerLending = "Personal Loan" AND Account.InterestRate = 15.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?balance WHERE {
  ?account a :Accounts .
  ?account p:Balance ?balance .
  ?account p:ConsumerLending ?consumerlending_w .
  ?account p:ConsumerLending ?consumerlending_w2 .
  ?account p:InterestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((STR(?consumerlending_w) = "Credit Card" || (STR(?consumerlending_w2) = "Personal Loan" && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0"))))
}

queries.question: List all credit card balances and personal loan balances with a 15% interest rate.
queries.sql:
SELECT Account.Balance 
FROM Account
WHERE (Account.ConsumerLending = "Credit Card" OR Account.ConsumerLending = "Personal Loan") AND Account.InterestRate = 15.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?balance WHERE {
  ?account a :Accounts .
  ?account p:Balance ?balance .
  ?account p:ConsumerLending ?consumerlending_w .
  ?account p:ConsumerLending ?consumerlending_w2 .
  ?account p:InterestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?consumerlending_w) = "Credit Card" || STR(?consumerlending_w2) = "Personal Loan")) && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0")))
}
